posts.title: From sparse datapoints to rich maps
posts.description: A deep learning model that predicts ground-level weather across entire areas, even where sensors don't exist, delivering results that outperform traditional high-resolution forecasts.

posts.title: How weather really shapes your EV range: the 2026 EV range report is out
posts.description: The 2026 EV range report identifies US states, European regions, and specific highways that enhance or diminish electric vehicle range based on weather conditions.

posts.title: From banned words to global standards: The evolution of weather alerts
posts.description: Examines how fragmented warning systems have been transformed into a unified, global alerts API for more consistent weather communications.

posts.title: Connect AI agents to live weather data with the Xweather MCP
posts.description: Demonstrates integration of OpenAI with the Xweather MCP server to enable real-time forecasts and decision-making capabilities.

posts.title: AI-native weather: introducing the Xweather MCP server
posts.description: Introduces a new interface allowing LLMs and AI agents to access weather data trusted by NASA and Fortune 100 organizations.
